---
title: "final coloc overlap exploration"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r setup}
suppressMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(VennDiagram)
  library(grid)
  library(here)
})

##  set project paths and key inputs for dlpfc and habenula coloc summaries.
here::i_am(".git/HEAD")
datadir <- here("processed-data", "eQTL")
refdir <- here("processed-data", "ref")
hb_root <- "/home/gpertea/work/R/Habenula_Pilot"

f_dlpfc <- file.path(datadir, "coloc", "coloc_abf_results.tsv.gz")
f_hb <- file.path(hb_root, "processed-data", "18_coloc", "supp_table.csv")
f_dlpfc_donor <- file.path(refdir, "donor_meta.tsv.gz")
f_hb_coldata <- file.path(hb_root, "processed-data", "17_eQTL", "tensorQTL_input", "colData.csv")
f_sens_sum <- file.path(datadir, "coloc", "prior_sensitivity", "w500k_prior_sensitivity_summary.tsv.gz")
f_sens_gene <- file.path(datadir, "coloc", "prior_sensitivity", "w500k_prior_sensitivity_per_gene.tsv.gz")

##  select overlap modes here; default runs both ensg and symbol.
overlap_modes <- c("ensg", "symbol")
stopifnot(all(overlap_modes %chin% c("ensg", "symbol")))

##  define output location for final comparison artifacts.
final_dir <- file.path(datadir, "coloc", "final")
if (!dir.exists(final_dir)) dir.create(final_dir, recursive = TRUE)
```

```{r concept-notes, eval=FALSE}
##  prior-sensitivity in coloc.abf means checking how stable posterior conclusions are when priors vary, especially p12.
##  this is recommended because posterior probabilities can shift under different prior beliefs about shared causality.
##  our base coloc run for dlpfc used fixed priors p1=1e-4, p2=1e-4, p12=1e-5 and then sensitivity varied p12 over a grid.
##  habenula used coloc.abf without explicit prior arguments, so coloc defaults were used (the same default values above).
##  dlpfc strategy differs by adding dual-window evaluation (500kb primary plus 1mb sensitivity) and a separate prior-sensitivity report.
##  habenula strategy centered on the primary coloc run and downstream strong filtering at pp.h4.abf >= 0.8.
```

```{r helpers}
##  define small helper utilities for schema checks and robust aggregation.
assert_file <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) stop("missing file: ", path)
}

assert_cols <- function(dt, cols, label) {
  miss <- setdiff(cols, names(dt))
  if (length(miss)) stop("missing columns in ", label, ": ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))
}

first_non_missing <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & x != ""]
  if (length(x)) x[[1]] else NA_character_
}

uniq_concat <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- sort(unique(x[!is.na(x) & x != ""]))
  if (length(x)) paste(x, collapse = ";") else NA_character_
}

std_symbol_key <- function(x) {
  y <- toupper(trimws(as.character(x)))
  y[y == ""] <- NA_character_
  y
}

normalize_gene_id <- function(x) sub("\\.\\d+$", "", as.character(x))

##  collapse rows into one row per overlap key and source set while preserving annotation lists.
collapse_set_rows <- function(dt, mode, key_col, set_name) {
  d <- copy(dt)
  d[, overlap_mode := mode]
  d[, overlap_key := get(key_col)]
  d <- d[!is.na(overlap_key) & overlap_key != ""]
  d[, .(
    gene_id_raw = first_non_missing(gene_id_raw),
    gene_id_norm = first_non_missing(gene_id_norm),
    gene_name = first_non_missing(gene_name),
    variant_id = first_non_missing(variant_id),
    rsid = first_non_missing(rsid),
    source_set = set_name,
    context_or_group = uniq_concat(context_or_group),
    gene_id_raw_list = uniq_concat(gene_id_raw),
    gene_id_norm_list = uniq_concat(gene_id_norm),
    gene_name_list = uniq_concat(gene_name),
    variant_id_list = uniq_concat(variant_id),
    rsid_list = uniq_concat(rsid)
  ), by = .(overlap_mode, overlap_key)]
}

##  aggregate annotations across all sets for venn and partition member tables.
collapse_annotation_rows <- function(dt, mode, key_col) {
  d <- copy(dt)
  d[, overlap_mode := mode]
  d[, overlap_key := get(key_col)]
  d <- d[!is.na(overlap_key) & overlap_key != ""]
  d[, .(
    gene_id_raw = first_non_missing(gene_id_raw),
    gene_id_norm = first_non_missing(gene_id_norm),
    gene_name = first_non_missing(gene_name),
    variant_id = first_non_missing(variant_id),
    rsid = first_non_missing(rsid),
    source_set = uniq_concat(source_set),
    context_or_group = uniq_concat(context_or_group),
    gene_id_raw_list = uniq_concat(gene_id_raw),
    gene_id_norm_list = uniq_concat(gene_id_norm),
    gene_name_list = uniq_concat(gene_name),
    variant_id_list = uniq_concat(variant_id),
    rsid_list = uniq_concat(rsid)
  ), by = .(overlap_mode, overlap_key)]
}

##  check that gene/variant tables keep required annotation columns.
req_gene_variant_cols <- c(
  "gene_id_raw", "gene_id_norm", "gene_name", "variant_id", "rsid",
  "source_set", "context_or_group"
)

##  draw a 3-way venn from set keys for the current overlap mode.
draw_venn <- function(spd_keys, spg_keys, hb_keys, mode_label) {
  n12 <- length(intersect(spd_keys, spg_keys))
  n13 <- length(intersect(spd_keys, hb_keys))
  n23 <- length(intersect(spg_keys, hb_keys))
  n123 <- length(Reduce(intersect, list(spd_keys, spg_keys, hb_keys)))
  grid.newpage()
  vp <- VennDiagram::draw.triple.venn(
    area1 = length(spd_keys), area2 = length(spg_keys), area3 = length(hb_keys),
    n12 = n12, n13 = n13, n23 = n23, n123 = n123,
    category = c("7 SpDs", "4 SPGs", "habenulaPilot"),
    fill = c("#8cc0de", "#6e9dc0", "#c2d17d"),
    cex = 1.1, cat.cex = 1.0, cat.pos = c(-20, 20, 180),
    euler.d = FALSE, scaled = FALSE, ind = FALSE
  )
  grid.draw(vp)
  grid.text(
    label = paste0("strong coloc overlap (", mode_label, " mode; PP4 >= 0.8)"),
    x = unit(0.5, "npc"), y = unit(0.98, "npc"),
    gp = gpar(fontsize = 11, fontface = "bold")
  )
}
```

```{r load-inputs}
##  load required dlpfc and habenula coloc tables and assert expected schema.
assert_file(f_dlpfc)
assert_file(f_hb)
assert_file(f_dlpfc_donor)
assert_file(f_hb_coldata)

dlpfc <- fread(f_dlpfc)
hb <- fread(f_hb)

assert_cols(dlpfc, c("fid", "gene_name", "lead_snp", "rsid", "PP4", "ds"), "dlpfc coloc table")
assert_cols(hb, c("gene", "gene_symbol", "snp", "snp_rs_id", "PP.H4.abf"), "habenula supp table")
```

```{r canonical-schema}
##  build canonical per-row schema so all downstream outputs have consistent annotation fields.
dlpfc_can <- dlpfc[, .(
  source_project = "DLPFC",
  source_set = fifelse(grepl("^spd", ds), "spd_union_input", "spg_union_input"),
  context_or_group = as.character(ds),
  group = fifelse(grepl("^spd", ds), "SpD", "SPG"),
  gene_id_raw = as.character(fid),
  gene_id_norm = normalize_gene_id(fid),
  gene_name = as.character(gene_name),
  variant_id = as.character(lead_snp),
  rsid = as.character(rsid),
  PP4 = as.numeric(PP4),
  cat = if ("cat" %chin% names(dlpfc)) as.character(cat) else NA_character_
)]
dlpfc_can[rsid == "", rsid := NA_character_]
dlpfc_can[, gene_symbol_key := std_symbol_key(gene_name)]

hb_can <- hb[, .(
  source_project = "habenulaPilot",
  source_set = "habenula_input",
  context_or_group = "habenulaPilot",
  group = "habenulaPilot",
  gene_id_raw = as.character(gene),
  gene_id_norm = normalize_gene_id(gene),
  gene_name = as.character(gene_symbol),
  variant_id = as.character(snp),
  rsid = as.character(snp_rs_id),
  PP4 = as.numeric(`PP.H4.abf`)
)]
hb_can[rsid == "", rsid := NA_character_]
hb_can[, gene_symbol_key := std_symbol_key(gene_name)]
```

```{r strong-filter}
##  define strong coloc sets using pp4 >= 0.8 for cross-study comparability.
strong_dlpfc <- dlpfc_can[PP4 >= 0.8]
strong_hb <- hb_can[PP4 >= 0.8]

##  check optional consistency between pp4 thresholding and existing cat labels in dlpfc.
if ("cat" %chin% names(strong_dlpfc)) {
  dlpfc_cat_check <- dlpfc_can[!is.na(cat), .(
    n = .N,
    n_pp4_strong = sum(PP4 >= 0.8),
    n_cat_strong = sum(cat == "strong_coloc")
  )]
  dlpfc_cat_check
}

##  bind all strong rows to simplify multi-set annotation and symbol ambiguity diagnostics.
all_strong <- rbindlist(list(strong_dlpfc, strong_hb), fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
```

```{r symbol-ambiguity-report}
##  report symbol ambiguity where one standardized symbol maps to multiple normalized ensg ids.
sym_amb <- all_strong[!is.na(gene_symbol_key), .(
  gene_id_raw = first_non_missing(gene_id_raw),
  gene_id_norm = first_non_missing(gene_id_norm),
  gene_name = first_non_missing(gene_name),
  variant_id = first_non_missing(variant_id),
  rsid = first_non_missing(rsid),
  source_set = uniq_concat(source_set),
  context_or_group = uniq_concat(context_or_group),
  n_gene_id_norm = uniqueN(gene_id_norm),
  gene_id_norm_list = uniq_concat(gene_id_norm),
  gene_name_list = uniq_concat(gene_name),
  variant_id_list = uniq_concat(variant_id),
  rsid_list = uniq_concat(rsid)
), by = .(symbol_key = gene_symbol_key)][n_gene_id_norm > 1]

f_sym_amb <- file.path(final_dir, "symbol_mode_ambiguity_report.tsv.gz")
fwrite(sym_amb, f_sym_amb, sep = "\t")
sym_amb[1:min(.N, 20L)]
```

```{r overlap-build-and-export}
##  construct spd, spg, and habenula sets in both overlap modes and export mode-specific tables.
mode_results <- list()
partition_counts_all <- list()

for (mode in overlap_modes) {
  key_col <- if (mode == "ensg") "gene_id_norm" else "gene_symbol_key"

  spd_rows <- strong_dlpfc[group == "SpD"]
  spg_rows <- strong_dlpfc[group == "SPG"]
  hb_rows <- strong_hb

  spd_set <- collapse_set_rows(spd_rows, mode = mode, key_col = key_col, set_name = "spd_union_input")
  spg_set <- collapse_set_rows(spg_rows, mode = mode, key_col = key_col, set_name = "spg_union_input")
  hb_set <- collapse_set_rows(hb_rows, mode = mode, key_col = key_col, set_name = "habenula_input")

  final_sets <- rbindlist(list(spd_set, spg_set, hb_set), fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
  assert_cols(final_sets, req_gene_variant_cols, paste0("final_sets_", mode))
  fwrite(final_sets, file.path(final_dir, sprintf("strong_coloc_final_sets_%s.tsv.gz", mode)), sep = "\t")

  all_keys <- sort(unique(c(spd_set$overlap_key, spg_set$overlap_key, hb_set$overlap_key)))
  venn_core <- data.table(overlap_mode = mode, overlap_key = all_keys)
  venn_core[, in_spd := overlap_key %chin% spd_set$overlap_key]
  venn_core[, in_spg := overlap_key %chin% spg_set$overlap_key]
  venn_core[, in_hb := overlap_key %chin% hb_set$overlap_key]
  venn_core[, partition_label := fcase(
    in_spd & in_spg & in_hb, "spd_spg_hb",
    in_spd & in_spg & !in_hb, "spd_spg_only",
    in_spd & !in_spg & in_hb, "spd_hb_only",
    !in_spd & in_spg & in_hb, "spg_hb_only",
    in_spd & !in_spg & !in_hb, "spd_only",
    !in_spd & in_spg & !in_hb, "spg_only",
    !in_spd & !in_spg & in_hb, "hb_only",
    default = "none"
  )]

  ann <- collapse_annotation_rows(all_strong, mode = mode, key_col = key_col)
  venn_annot <- merge(venn_core, ann, by = c("overlap_mode", "overlap_key"), all.x = TRUE)
  assert_cols(venn_annot, req_gene_variant_cols, paste0("venn_annot_", mode))

  fwrite(venn_annot, file.path(final_dir, sprintf("strong_coloc_venn_input_%s.tsv.gz", mode)), sep = "\t")
  fwrite(venn_annot, file.path(final_dir, sprintf("strong_coloc_partition_members_%s.tsv.gz", mode)), sep = "\t")

  group_counts <- data.table(
    overlap_mode = mode,
    source_set = c("spd_union_input", "spg_union_input", "habenula_input"),
    n_keys = c(uniqueN(spd_set$overlap_key), uniqueN(spg_set$overlap_key), uniqueN(hb_set$overlap_key))
  )
  fwrite(group_counts, file.path(final_dir, sprintf("strong_coloc_group_counts_%s.tsv.gz", mode)), sep = "\t")

  pcounts <- venn_annot[, .N, by = .(overlap_mode, partition_label)][order(partition_label)]
  partition_counts_all[[mode]] <- pcounts

  mode_results[[mode]] <- list(
    spd_keys = spd_set$overlap_key,
    spg_keys = spg_set$overlap_key,
    hb_keys = hb_set$overlap_key,
    final_sets = final_sets,
    venn_annot = venn_annot,
    group_counts = group_counts,
    partition_counts = pcounts
  )
}

partition_counts_all <- rbindlist(partition_counts_all, fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
f_part_counts <- file.path(final_dir, "strong_coloc_partition_counts_by_mode.tsv.gz")
fwrite(partition_counts_all, f_part_counts, sep = "\t")
```

```{r validation-checks}
##  run basic validation checks on overlap outputs and required metadata presence.
for (mode in overlap_modes) {
  x <- mode_results[[mode]]$final_sets
  y <- mode_results[[mode]]$venn_annot
  assert_cols(x, req_gene_variant_cols, paste0("validated_final_sets_", mode))
  assert_cols(y, req_gene_variant_cols, paste0("validated_venn_annot_", mode))
  stopifnot(nrow(x) > 0L)
  stopifnot(nrow(y) > 0L)
  stopifnot(any(y$in_spd | y$in_spg | y$in_hb))
}
```

```{r venn-plots}
##  draw one 3-way venn per overlap mode.
for (mode in overlap_modes) {
  draw_venn(
    spd_keys = mode_results[[mode]]$spd_keys,
    spg_keys = mode_results[[mode]]$spg_keys,
    hb_keys = mode_results[[mode]]$hb_keys,
    mode_label = mode
  )
}
```

```{r context-barplot}
##  plot dlpfc strong coloc counts by context using pp4 >= 0.8.
ctx_counts <- strong_dlpfc[, .N, by = .(context_or_group, group)][order(context_or_group)]
ctx_counts[, context_or_group := factor(context_or_group, levels = unique(context_or_group))]

ggplot(ctx_counts, aes(x = context_or_group, y = N, fill = group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "dlpfc context",
    y = "number of strong loci",
    title = "dlpfc strong coloc counts by context",
    subtitle = "strong definition is PP4 >= 0.8"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r group-barplot}
##  compare spd/spg/habenula set sizes for each overlap mode.
group_counts_all <- rbindlist(lapply(overlap_modes, function(mode) mode_results[[mode]]$group_counts), fill = TRUE)
group_counts_all[, source_set := factor(source_set, levels = c("spd_union_input", "spg_union_input", "habenula_input"))]

ggplot(group_counts_all, aes(x = source_set, y = n_keys, fill = source_set)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  facet_wrap(~ overlap_mode, ncol = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "grouped set",
    y = "unique strong overlap keys",
    title = "strong set sizes by overlap mode",
    subtitle = "strong definition is PP4 >= 0.8"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r mode-comparison}
##  summarize and plot n_overlap between ensg and symbol modes by partition class.
mode_cmp <- dcast(
  partition_counts_all,
  partition_label ~ overlap_mode,
  value.var = "N",
  fill = 0
)
f_mode_cmp <- file.path(final_dir, "strong_coloc_n_overlap_mode_comparison.tsv.gz")
fwrite(mode_cmp, f_mode_cmp, sep = "\t")
mode_cmp

mode_cmp_long <- melt(mode_cmp, id.vars = "partition_label", variable.name = "overlap_mode", value.name = "N")
ggplot(mode_cmp_long, aes(x = partition_label, y = N, fill = overlap_mode)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "intersection class",
    y = "n_overlap",
    title = "n_overlap comparison by overlap mode"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r donor-overlap}
##  compute donor overlap counts and overlapped ids between dlpfc and habenula cohorts.
dlpfc_donor <- fread(f_dlpfc_donor)
hb_coldata <- fread(f_hb_coldata)
assert_cols(dlpfc_donor, c("BrNum"), "dlpfc donor metadata")
assert_cols(hb_coldata, c("BrNum"), "habenula colData")

norm_br <- function(x) toupper(trimws(as.character(x)))
d_ids <- sort(unique(norm_br(dlpfc_donor$BrNum)))
h_ids <- sort(unique(norm_br(hb_coldata$BrNum)))
ov_ids <- sort(intersect(d_ids, h_ids))

donor_overlap_summary <- data.table(
  n_dlpfc = length(d_ids),
  n_habenula = length(h_ids),
  n_overlap = length(ov_ids)
)
donor_overlap_ids <- data.table(BrNum = ov_ids)

fwrite(donor_overlap_summary, file.path(final_dir, "donor_overlap_summary.tsv.gz"), sep = "\t")
fwrite(donor_overlap_ids, file.path(final_dir, "donor_overlap_ids.tsv.gz"), sep = "\t")

donor_overlap_summary
donor_overlap_ids
```

```{r supplemental-prior-sensitivity}
##  load supplemental prior-sensitivity outputs if available and summarize strong-locus robustness.
if (file.exists(f_sens_sum) && file.exists(f_sens_gene)) {
  sens_sum <- fread(f_sens_sum)
  sens_gene <- fread(f_sens_gene)
  assert_cols(sens_gene, c("ds", "fid", "default_pass", "frac_pass", "min_pass_p12"), "prior sensitivity per-gene")

  strong_key <- unique(strong_dlpfc[, .(ds = context_or_group, fid = gene_id_raw)])
  sens_strong <- merge(
    strong_key,
    sens_gene,
    by = c("ds", "fid"),
    all.x = TRUE
  )
  sens_strong_summary <- sens_strong[, .(
    n_strong = .N,
    n_with_sensitivity = sum(!is.na(frac_pass)),
    n_default_pass = sum(default_pass == TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_frac_pass = mean(frac_pass, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_any_pass_grid = sum(!is.na(min_pass_p12))
  ), by = ds][order(ds)]

  f_sens_strong <- file.path(final_dir, "strong_coloc_prior_sensitivity_summary.tsv.gz")
  fwrite(sens_strong_summary, f_sens_strong, sep = "\t")
  sens_strong_summary
} else {
  message("prior-sensitivity files not found; skipping supplemental panel.")
}
```
